texto: This is a popper and it can catch a lot of fish. It stirs up the top of the water. It looks like this. Similar to the classic hula popper, it scoots along and kicks up water. Now there's definitely fish here, but this is what it looks like in action. The fish will feel commotion and bite, especially bass. These are one of those items I always recommend having in the taco box.
